content.en:
"The Red Dragon Clan is really unlucky, a blood transformation realm that was bullied casually turned into an ancient-level genius of the three bone transformation realms in the later stage, who would have thought of this!"

Ye Tian sighed secretly.

I have to say that the Red Dragon Clan still has no background and luck, otherwise it will not be destroyed.

Knowing the situation in the Yahe Realm, he felt that it was better to blend into the Yahe Palace, and there was no need for several other top overlord-level forces to blend in.

"Then go to Yahe Palace!"

Ye Tian decided.

And Yahe Palace, as the first top overlord-level force in the Yahe Realm, has high requirements for members, and it is not easy to join.

However, it was naturally not difficult for Ye Tian to join Yahe Palace.

No matter how powerful Yahe Palace is, it will still need primitive-level geniuses and boundary-breaking geniuses!

Thereupon.

Ye Tian's copied body began to cultivate towards the Boundary-Breaking Genius and the Ancient Genius, and then blended into the Yahe Palace.

However, his true body did not stay in the Yahe Boundary Crack for a short time, so when his true body was moved out, he might not be able to blend into the high-level position of Yahe Palace.

"I still have to find a way to get some resources and take them away!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After a period of time, Ye Tian's Gu Lou Heavenly Ancestor copied his body and infiltrated Yahe Palace as an ancient-level genius, and then practiced in Yahe Palace with peace of mind, and soon came into contact with the Ancient Golden Text.

I have to say that there are a lot of ancient gold inscriptions in Yahe Palace, and he has only been exposed to a small part, and he can already comprehend a lot of ancient gold inscriptions.

Subsequently, he knew that Yahe Palace had several resources that would help the Nine Blood Transformation Realm primordial-level geniuses to attack the Bone Transformation Realm.

Yahe gold liquid!

Ancient vine fruit!

Endless Golden Marrow!

These three resources can all help primeval-level geniuses complete the last few immeasurable bones and bone transformation, but even Yahe Palace doesn't have much, unless they make great contributions to obtain these resources.

"Yahe Golden Liquid is located in Yahe, which is a special treasure land in the Yahe Boundary Seam, but it was occupied by Yahe Palace, and Yahe Palace was built on Yahe. "

"The primeval vine fruit is the fruit that bears on the primeval vine, and it will only bear one fruit in the 100,000 primeval era, and once it bears fruit, it will be taken away by the Yahe Palace, don't think about it. "

"As for the Endless Golden Essence, it is a resource extracted from the Endless Ancient Gold, and the Endless Ancient Gold is found in all the territories of the Yahe Realm, but the extraction requires the help of the Bone Transformation Realm. "

Ye Tian thought about it carefully, the most promising thing was the Endless Golden Essence, followed by the Yahe Golden Liquid.

But if you want to make one of his immeasurable bones change, you need a lot of endless gold pith, which means that you need to collect a large amount of endless ancient gold.

However, the endless ancient gold in the various territories of the Yahe Boundary Crack is scattered, and it would be good to be able to trade a few pieces, and if you want to buy a large number of them, only Yahe Palace can do it.

"Yahe Palace's control of resources is too ruthless, even if other top overlord-level forces want to cultivate an Ancient-level genius-level bone transformation realm, it is almost impossible, and even ordinary bone transformation realms are difficult to cultivate. Ye Tian muttered.

In this case, it is difficult for him to scrape together a resource, and he has to think of other ways, and conventional methods will definitely not work.

That's when a piece of news came.

A branch of Yahe Palace was attacked, a large number of Blood Transformation Realm creatures were killed, and a Bone Transformation Realm elder was also killed, and all resources were attacked.

Hearing this news, Ye Tian immediately thought of the Lord of the Cave Void.

"It should be the main stem of the Cave Void, and only he has the strength and guts to dare to attack Yahe Palace!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

At this time, one of the Bone Transformation Realms of Yahe Palace was alarmed, and vowed to hunt down and kill the Lord of the Cave Void.

From this incident onwards, the entire Yahe Realm became a little chaotic.

Soon after, the Lord of the Void attacked a branch again, but without success, he was besieged by multiple Bone Transformation Realms.

However, the Lord of the Cave Void still escaped in time, and also severely damaged a bone transformation realm in Yahe Palace.

In the following years, Yahe Palace continued to encircle and suppress the Lord of the Cave Void, but each time it was unsuccessful.

I have to say that the escape ability of the Lord of the Void is still very strong.

The chaos caused by this could not be resolved, and even some branches were understaffed.

this day.

Yahe Palace mobilized Ye Tian, the ancient Lou Heavenly Ancestor, to guard a branch, because that branch was attacked and many Blood Transformation Realm creatures died, so it was necessary to send some Blood Transformation Realm powerhouses to guard it.

Originally, an ancient-level genius like him didn't need to go to the town, but he had only joined Yahe Palace not long ago, so he was not taken seriously.

But Ye Tian was very excited, because he went to that branch department, he had hope of doing something!

If you stay in Yahe Palace all the time, you won't have any chances.

Even if he is the master of the void, he doesn't dare to break into the Yahe Palace!

......

Yahe Palace, Conghai Branch.

Ye Tian was sent here, and after he came, he was arranged to sit in an area, and if he encountered a problem, he would solve it as soon as possible.

In addition, the Endless Ancient Gold collected by some of the Blood Transformation Realm creatures below also had to be handed over by him to the Conghai Branch.

"I didn't expect that after being sent here, I would be able to access the Endless Ancient Gold!"

Ye Tian felt a little surprised.

Soon, he had an idea, that is, to find a way to rob the endless ancient gold of the Conghai Branch, which was many times faster than collecting it slowly.

Of course.

His replica body will definitely not participate, and his hands must be real copies of his body.

After all, his duplicate body finally blended into Yahe Palace, and it couldn't be scrapped.

this day.

Ye Tian finally found an opportunity.

This branch has always had a Bone Transformation Realm guard, and this time this Bone Transformation Realm left.

And Ye Tian had already figured out the situation of the magic circle and the location of the treasure house of this Conghai Branch, so he could do it directly.

"My real body is a copy of the body, and my combat power is infinitely close to the Bone Transformation Realm, even no less than that very weak Bone Transformation Realm, once I do it, the success rate is very high!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently.

He immediately got his hands dirty.

Conghai Division.

Ye Tian directly killed in, a nine-time Blood Transformation Realm Breaking Genius and a number of Nine Blood Transformation Realm creatures stopped him, and he was directly killed by him using the Ancient God and Demon Fist.

Bang!!!

A punch fell, and these Blood Transformation Realm creatures were directly killed.

Immediately after, he broke through the magic circles one after another, and finally came to the location of the treasure house.

Thundered!!!!

Blow after blow, the treasure house was finally broken.

He didn't even check what the resources of the treasure trove had, he just took them away, and then quickly fled.

After a while, a bone transformation realm returned, and when he saw the looted Conghai Branch, he was immediately furious.
